p_named.text: Lily and the cat  became friends and they both went on fun adventures together.

Lily and the cat  played together for a while, but soon it was time for Lily to go home. She said goodbye to the cat and promised to come back and play with it again soon. 

From that day on, Lily and the cat became good friends, and Lily never let the cat down again.

Lily and the cat  played together for a while, chasing each other and having fun. When it was time for Lily to go home, she said goodbye to the cat and thanked it for playing with her. The cat meowed back and Lily waved goodbye. She couldn't wait to see her cat again.
